events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need parse scenario: commercial construction, fireblocking & draftstopping, observed unblocked soffits, rough-complete. Reference IRC R302. Need identify component/condition and visible defect cues. Decision must fail if dangerous or non-compliant. Unblocked soffits violate fireblocking requirements. So decision fail. Risk high/critical? Fireblocking missing can allow fire/smoke spread, critical. Work stage rough-complete. Component conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 80? Value not asked 0. Sound etc 0. Findings: soffits not fireblocked; gaps/openings not sealed; draftstopping missing. Actions: install approved fireblocking material at soffit framing; inspect all concealed spaces; verify with code official. Rationale: IRC R302 requires fireblocking in concealed spaces including soffits to impede fire/smoke; observed unblocked soffits at rough-complete is non-compliant. References: IRC R302. Need valid JSON only, no prose. Ensure fields.

events.label: response
